versions.version_description: Accurate, easy acoustic strum version. Needs a capo on the second fret to match recording.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
I CAN'T TELL YOU WHY

[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch] 4x  (capo 2) play C


[tab][ch]CM7[/ch]                          [ch]FM7[/ch]
Look at us baby up all night tearing our love apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]CM7[/ch]                                              [ch]FM7[/ch]                    
Aren't we the same two people who lived through years in the[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]E7sus[/ch]-[ch]E7[/ch]
         dark?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]FM7[/ch]                      [ch]E7[/ch]
Every time I try to walk away something makes me turn around[/tab]
 
     and stay
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch] pause.  ([ch]Am[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch])          
And I can't tell you why.[/tab]
[tab][ch]CM7[/ch]                                   [ch]FM7[/ch]
When we get crazy it just ain't right girl I get lonely too[/tab]
[tab][ch]CM7[/ch]                                       [ch]FM7[/ch]         [ch]E7sus[/ch]
You don't have to worry just hold on tight   'cause I love[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E7[/ch]
 you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]FM7[/ch]                     
Nothing's wrong as far as I can see   we make it harder then[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E7sus[/ch]-[ch]E7[/ch]
 it has to be[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
And I can't tell you why no baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]FM7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]- [ch]E7[/ch]
I can't tell you why.....[/tab]
[tab][ch]FM7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch] pause (Am-G) 2x
I can't tell you why....[/tab]

[Adlib:]  [ch]CM7[/ch]-[ch]FM7[/ch]-[ch]CM7[/ch]-[ch]FM7[/ch]-[ch]E7sus[/ch]-[ch]E7[/ch]-[ch]Am[/ch]

[2nd Adlib:]  [ch]FM7[/ch]-[ch]G[/ch] (7x) [ch]E7sus[/ch]-[ch]E7[/ch]
              [ch]FM7[/ch]-[ch]G[/ch]. . . . . . .
